_README: Per-machine local-LLM config. Copy to llm_config.json (gitignored) and edit. Any value here is overridden by the matching env var. Leave a key out (or empty) to use its default.
_gpu_arch_help: ampere (3090/A100) | ada (4090/L40) | hopper (H100) | blackwell. Drives which checkpoint formats are downloadable. ampere blocks fp8 + nvfp4.
_blocked_quant_terms_help: Optional override: list of repo-id substrings to exclude when resolving a checkpoint, e.g. ["fp8", "nvfp4", "gguf"]. Leave out to use the gpu_arch defaults.
